name: Slack
description: Monitor Slack workspace members and admin access for communication security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://api.slack.com/apps and create a new Slack app
2. Under 'OAuth & Permissions', add Bot Token Scopes: users:read, users:read.email, team:read
3. Install the app to your workspace
4. Set redirect URI to https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
5. Enter Client ID and Client Secret below

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews all active Slack workspace members and flags deactivated accounts that retain workspace access

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Audits Slack workspace admin and owner accounts to ensure privileged access is limited and accounted for
